hero.description: PhD student in Computational Materials Science at Nanyang Technological University, working on crystal structure prediction, first-principles workflows, and AI-accelerated materials discovery.

summary.title: Materials discovery across computation and learning.
summary.description: I study how atomic structure, energetic stability, and functional response connect in complex materials. My current interests sit between robust first-principles calculation, efficient structure exploration, and machine learning models that make larger search spaces tractable.
